creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: nox
Date: Tue Dec 31 17:57:25 2013
New Revision: 338330
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/338330

Log:
  Deprecate: Depends on expired multimedia/xbmc-pvr.
  
  PR:		ports/185368
  Submitted by:	rene

Modified:
  head/multimedia/xbmc-addon-xvdr/Makefile

Modified: head/multimedia/xbmc-addon-xvdr/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/multimedia/xbmc-addon-xvdr/Makefile	Tue Dec 31 16:33:23 2013	(r338329)
+++ head/multimedia/xbmc-addon-xvdr/Makefile	Tue Dec 31 17:57:25 2013	(r338330)
@@ -11,6 +11,9 @@ DISTNAME=	pipelka-${PORTNAME}-xvdr-${POR
 MAINTAINER=	nox@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	XBMC xvdr pvr addon
 
+DEPRECATED=	Depends on expired multimedia/xbmc-pvr
+EXPIRATION_DATE=2014-02-01
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS+=	xbmc:${PORTSDIR}/multimedia/xbmc-pvr
 RUN_DEPENDS+=	xbmc:${PORTSDIR}/multimedia/xbmc-pvr
